description: The narrow dirt path is crawling with hissing shoelace snakes. Their frayed tongues flick menacingly as they slither between the shoe-tree roots. Fred nervously trodded past them in the story — but you'll have to deal with at least one. A wild potato sits conspicuously on a rock.

wall.description: Knotted laces form a dense barrier. Something slithers just behind them.

floor.description: The dirt path is covered with shed lace-scales. Each step makes a crunching sound that draws attention.

edge_n.description: The path leads back north toward the forest entrance. Safety beckons.

exit_south.description: Past the snakes, the path continues south. Through the trees you can just make out a small shack.

enemy_snake.description: A coiled Shoelace Snake blocks the center of the path. Its frayed tongue flicks menacingly, and it hisses a warning as you approach.

enemy.name: Shoelace Snake
enemy.defeat_message: The Shoelace Snake unravels into a harmless pile of laces! You step over the remains and continue south.

item_potato.description: A large, wild potato sits on a flat rock, looking remarkably fresh. How did a potato end up in a forest full of snakes?
